title: Bottle Opener with Cap Collector Catcher,Vintage Wooden Wall Mounted Bottle Opener，Ideal Gift for Men and Beer Lovers, Use as Bar Decoration.
features: 【SUPER CONVENIENCE】When you need to open the bottle cap in front of the guests , you don't need to open the cap with your teeth or in other strange ways. You can quickly open any beer with one hand and avoid the trouble of finding the bottle opener. Once the bottle is opened, the Cap is neatly collected in the bottom Storage basket.
【MATERIAL】Made of wood and iron, light weight, corrosion resistant, easy to dry, not easy to deform, durable.
【EASY TO INSTALL】Our products are easy to install, you can install it on any wall or anywhere you like, in the kitchen or next to the refrigerator, as long as it is installed properly.
【SUITABLE FOR ALL OCCASIONS】This bottle opener can be installed not only indoors, but also outside, such as a garden fence or garage, and the bar is also suitable.
【UNIQUE GIFT】For those who like to drink beer or bottled drinks, this is their favorite gift, they can enjoy the beer or drink.
description: Product Description Arola Bottle Opener with Cap Collector Catcher,Vintage Wooden Wall Mounted Bottle Opener，Ideal Gift for Men and Beer Lovers, Use as Bar Decoration. Cheers! You will never have to spend hours looking through drawer again to find a bottle opener while your friends and family wait around with their cold beverage in their hand that they can't open. UNIQUE GIFT For those who like to drink beer or bottled drinks, this is their favorite gift, they can enjoy the beer or drink. This bottle opener can be installed not only indoors, but also outside, such as a garden fence or garage, and the bar is also suitable.
